title: chrysanthemum sichotense
intro: Chrysanthemum sichotense, also known as Sichuan chrysanthemum or Sichuan tea, is a type of flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Sichuan, China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum sichotense include reducing fever, relieving headache and sore throat, and improving digestion, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, Chrysanthemum sichotense is often consumed as a tea, infusing its flowers in hot water to create a soothing and flavorful drink, or it may be used in combination with other herbs to create a medicinal tonic.
